marked.text:
mbh_01.001.000 nārāyaṇaṁ namaskr̥tya naraṁ caiva narottamam
mbh_01.001.000 devīṁ sarasvatīṁ caiva tato jayam udīrayet
mbh_01.001.001 lomaharṣaṇaputra ugraśravāḥ sūtaḥ paurāṇiko naimiṣāraṇye śaunakasya kulapater dvādaśavārṣike satre
mbh_01.001.002 samāsīnān abhyagacchad brahmarṣīn saṁśitavratān
mbh_01.001.002 vinayāvanato bhūtvā kadā cit sūtanandanaḥ
mbh_01.001.003 tam āśramam anuprāptaṁ naimiṣāraṇyavāsinaḥ
mbh_01.001.003 citrāḥ śrotuṁ kathās tatra parivavrus tapasvinaḥ
mbh_01.001.004 abhivādya munīṁs tāṁs tu sarvān eva kr̥tāñjaliḥ
mbh_01.001.004 apr̥cchat sa tapovr̥ddhiṁ sadbhiś caivābhinanditaḥ
mbh_01.001.005 atha teṣūpaviṣṭeṣu sarveṣv eva tapasviṣu
mbh_01.001.005 nirdiṣṭam āsanaṁ bheje vinayāl lomaharṣaṇiḥ
mbh_01.001.006 sukhāsīnaṁ tatas taṁ tu viśrāntam upalakṣya ca
mbh_01.001.006 athāpr̥cchad r̥ṣis tatra kaś cit prastāvayan kathāḥ
mbh_01.001.007 kuta āgamyate saute kva cāyaṁ vihr̥tas tvayā
mbh_01.001.007 kālaḥ kamalapatrākṣa śaṁsaitat pr̥cchato mama
mbh_01.001.008 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.001.008 janamejayasya rājarṣeḥ sarpasatre mahātmanaḥ
mbh_01.001.008 samīpe pārthivendrasya samyak pārikṣitasya ca
mbh_01.001.009 kr̥ṣṇadvaipāyanaproktāḥ supuṇyā vividhāḥ kathāḥ
mbh_01.001.009 kathitāś cāpi vidhivad yā vaiśaṁpāyanena vai
mbh_01.001.010 śrutvāhaṁ tā vicitrārthā mahābhāratasaṁśritāḥ
mbh_01.001.010 bahūni saṁparikramya tīrthāny āyatanāni ca
mbh_01.001.011 samantapañcakaṁ nāma puṇyaṁ dvijaniṣevitam
mbh_01.001.011 gatavān asmi taṁ deśaṁ yuddhaṁ yatrābhavat purā
mbh_01.001.011 pāṇḍavānāṁ kurūṇāṁ ca sarveṣāṁ ca mahīkṣitām
mbh_01.001.012 didr̥kṣur āgatas tasmāt samīpaṁ bhavatām iha
mbh_01.001.012 āyuṣmantaḥ sarva eva brahmabhūtā hi me matāḥ
mbh_01.001.013 asmin yajñe mahābhāgāḥ sūryapāvakavarcasaḥ
mbh_01.001.013 kr̥tābhiṣekāḥ śucayaḥ kr̥tajapyā hutāgnayaḥ
mbh_01.001.013 bhavanta āsate svasthā bravīmi kim ahaṁ dvijāḥ
mbh_01.001.014 purāṇasaṁśritāḥ puṇyāḥ kathā vā dharmasaṁśritāḥ
mbh_01.001.014 itivr̥ttaṁ narendrāṇām r̥ṣīṇāṁ ca mahātmanām
mbh_01.001.015 r̥ṣaya ūcuḥ
mbh_01.001.015 dvaipāyanena yat proktaṁ purāṇaṁ paramarṣiṇā
mbh_01.001.015 surair brahmarṣibhiś caiva śrutvā yad abhipūjitam
mbh_01.001.016 tasyākhyānavariṣṭhasya vicitrapadaparvaṇaḥ
mbh_01.001.016 sūkṣmārthanyāyayuktasya vedārthair bhūṣitasya ca
mbh_01.001.017 bhāratasyetihāsasya puṇyāṁ granthārthasaṁyutām
mbh_01.001.017 saṁskāropagatāṁ brāhmīṁ nānāśāstropabr̥ṁhitām
mbh_01.001.018 janamejayasya yāṁ rājño vaiśaṁpāyana uktavān
mbh_01.001.018 yathāvat sa r̥ṣis tuṣṭyā satre dvaipāyanājñayā
mbh_01.001.019 vedaiś caturbhiḥ samitāṁ vyāsasyādbhutakarmaṇaḥ
mbh_01.001.019 saṁhitāṁ śrotum icchāmo dharmyāṁ pāpabhayāpahām
mbh_01.001.020 sūta uvāca
mbh_01.001.020 ādyaṁ puruṣam īśānaṁ puruhūtaṁ puruṣṭutam
mbh_01.001.020 r̥tam ekākṣaraṁ brahma vyaktāvyaktaṁ sanātanam
mbh_01.001.021 asac ca sac caiva ca yad viśvaṁ sadasataḥ param
mbh_01.001.021 parāvarāṇāṁ sraṣṭāraṁ purāṇaṁ param avyayam
mbh_01.001.022 maṅgalyaṁ maṅgalaṁ viṣṇuṁ vareṇyam anaghaṁ śucim
mbh_01.001.022 namaskr̥tya hr̥ṣīkeśaṁ carācaraguruṁ harim
mbh_01.001.023 maharṣeḥ pūjitasyeha sarvaloke mahātmanaḥ
mbh_01.001.023 pravakṣyāmi mataṁ kr̥tsnaṁ vyāsasyāmitatejasaḥ
mbh_01.001.024 ācakhyuḥ kavayaḥ ke cit saṁpraty ācakṣate pare
mbh_01.001.024 ākhyāsyanti tathaivānye itihāsam imaṁ bhuvi
mbh_01.001.025 idaṁ tu triṣu lokeṣu mahaj jñānaṁ pratiṣṭhitam
mbh_01.001.025 vistaraiś ca samāsaiś ca dhāryate yad dvijātibhiḥ
mbh_01.001.026 alaṁkr̥taṁ śubhaiḥ śabdaiḥ samayair divyamānuṣaiḥ
mbh_01.001.026 chandovr̥ttaiś ca vividhair anvitaṁ viduṣāṁ priyam
mbh_01.001.027 niṣprabhe ’smin nirāloke sarvatas tamasāvr̥te
mbh_01.001.027 br̥had aṇḍam abhūd ekaṁ prajānāṁ bījam akṣayam
mbh_01.001.028 yugasyādau nimittaṁ tan mahad divyaṁ pracakṣate
mbh_01.001.028 yasmiṁs tac chrūyate satyaṁ jyotir brahma sanātanam
mbh_01.001.029 adbhutaṁ cāpy acintyaṁ ca sarvatra samatāṁ gatam
mbh_01.001.029 avyaktaṁ kāraṇaṁ sūkṣmaṁ yat tat sadasadātmakam
mbh_01.001.030 yasmāt pitāmaho jajñe prabhur ekaḥ prajāpatiḥ
mbh_01.001.030 brahmā suraguruḥ sthāṇur manuḥ kaḥ parameṣṭhy atha
m
